title: fix(deps): update module github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2 to v2.3.5

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rootless-containers/rootlesskit (github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.3.5`](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.3.5)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.3.4...v2.3.5)

##### Changes

Bumped up the deps

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.3.4...v2.3.5

##### Install

    mkdir -p ~/bin
    curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download//rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin

##### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/14899716761
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is 35c4618e1e9a5cb2aaea08edbba6e3de5bbeedd00a65fcf7d14f31fc942a7655 .

### [`v2.3.4`](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.3.4)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.3.3...v2.3.4)

##### Changes

-   detach-netns: fixed a regression in v2.3.3 that affected BuildKit ([#​500](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/500))

##### Install

    mkdir -p ~/bin
    curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download//rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin

##### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/13755373685
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is 7e3482e58884ce012caab1868d86fd8d0d23349be33b6ea2f2084a4aad37d3a5 .

### [`v2.3.3`](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/tag/v2.3.3)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/compare/v2.3.2...v2.3.3)

##### Changes

-   detach-netns: support Ubuntu 25.04 ([#​496](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/496), [#​497](https://redirect.github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/issues/497))

Full changes: https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/milestone/13?closed=1

##### Install

    mkdir -p ~/bin
    curl -sSL https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/releases/download//rootlesskit-$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar Cxzv ~/bin

##### About the binaries

The binaries were built automatically on GitHub Actions.
See the log to verify SHA256SUMS.
https://github.com/rootless-containers/rootlesskit/actions/runs/13754535888
The sha256sum of the SHA256SUMS file itself is 3be050da11a39e144ce747c1fd873912fb7c932fe4b5682fb2dc2b08cf3eabd8 .
